data.current_description: Computes the logarithm of the given expression. Use format base|value (e.g. 2l8 for log base 2 of 8).

data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic and doesn't specify that a base is involved. Description lacks clarity on the exact input format (uses '2l8' which appears to be a typo for '2|8'), missing output details about the MathResult response structure, and missing context about supported value ranges. data.current_description: Finds the tangent line of a function at a given x value. Expression format: c|f(x) where c is the x value and f(x) is the function.
data.summary_suggestion: Find tangent line at a point
data.description_suggestion: Computes the equation of the tangent line to a function at a specified x value. Accepts an expression in the format c|f(x) where c is the x-coordinate and f(x) is the function. Returns a MathResult object containing the tangent line equation in slope-intercept form. The tangent line represents the linear approximation of the function at the given point.
data.reasoning: The current summary is vague ('the tangent line' without context). The description explains the format but lacks information about the output format and mathematical significance. Improved summary to include 'at a point' for clarity, and enhanced description with return type (MathResult), output format (slope-intercept), and mathematical context for better AI agent understanding.
